'''Koratas''' was the fourth [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]]. It had red soil that hid several deposits of [[Neutronium/Legends|neutronium]], [[Lommite/Legends|lommite]] and [[Zersium/Legends|zersium]]. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] mined the minerals for use in making [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]].<ref name="CTD">''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]''</ref> Following the Battle Of Endor in [[4 ABY/Legends|4ABY]], the moon was excavated to build [[Rancor Base]] within.

==Behind the scenes==
Three moons of Dathomir appeared in [[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed|''Jump to Lightspeed'']], the [[2004]] expansion pack for the [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], prior to the [[Star Wars video games|game's]] closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="JTL">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]''</ref><ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> One of these moons may have been Koratas, however as Dathomir had a total of four moons, it is possible that Koratas may have been the one moon not pictured in the game.<ref name="GATORW">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref>
